name: Tortilla Casserole5
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the beef in oil.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except tortilla chips.
3. Pour mixture into a buttered 2-quart casserole dish and alternate layers of beef and tortilla chips, ending with chips on top.
4. Sprinkle any remaining cheese over the top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes. Serves 6 to 8.
